metadata.title: Kuaishou Corporate Culture & AI Rules Knowledge Quiz
metadata.description: Covering Kuaishou corporate culture, values, AI product matrix, information security regulations, employee benefits, and more

easy.question: What is the name of Kuaishou's corporate culture values?
easy.explanation: Kuaishou Pai is the name of Kuaishou's corporate culture values system.

easy.question: What is the core concept of Kuaishou Pai?
easy.explanation: Obsessed with Customers is the core concept and starting point of Kuaishou Pai.

easy.question: What two keywords does the 'Methods of Success' of Kuaishou Pai include?
easy.explanation: The Methods of Success includes two dimensions: Innovative & Pragmatic and Highest Standard.

easy.question: What two keywords does the 'Way of Working Together' of Kuaishou Pai include?
easy.explanation: The Way of Working Together includes two dimensions: Dare to Act and Candid & Clear.

easy.question: What is Kuaishou's mission?
options: To be the biggest short video platform
Obsessed with creating value for customers
easy.answer: Obsessed with creating value for customers
easy.explanation: Kuaishou's mission is to be obsessed with creating value for customers.

easy.question: What is Kuaishou's vision?
options: To become the world's largest tech company
To help people discover what they need and express their strengths, continuously enhancing everyone's unique sense of happiness
To build the most advanced AI
easy.answer: To help people discover what they need and express their strengths, continuously enhancing everyone's unique sense of happiness
easy.explanation: Kuaishou's vision is to help people discover what they need and express their strengths, continuously enhancing everyone's unique sense of happiness.

easy.question: Who are the two co-founders of Kuaishou?
easy.explanation: Kuaishou was co-founded by Su Hua and Cheng Yixiao.

easy.question: What was Kuaishou's predecessor called?
easy.explanation: Kuaishou's predecessor was GIF Kuaishou, a GIF creation tool.

easy.question: In what year did Kuaishou go public?
easy.explanation: Kuaishou went public on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange in 2021.

easy.question: What is Kuaishou's self-developed large language model called?
easy.explanation: KwaiYii is Kuaishou's self-developed large language model.

easy.question: What is Kuaishou's self-developed video generation large model called?
easy.explanation: KeLing is Kuaishou's self-developed video generation large model.

easy.question: What is Kuaishou's self-developed image generation large model called?
easy.explanation: KeTu is Kuaishou's self-developed image generation large model.

easy.question: What is the approximate daily meal allowance per person at Kuaishou's employee cafeteria?
easy.explanation: Kuaishou provides an approximate daily meal allowance of 120 RMB per person.

easy.question: What is Kuaishou's AI emotional companionship robot called?
easy.explanation: AI XiaoKuai is Kuaishou's AI emotional companionship robot.

easy.question: What is Kuaishou's stock code?
easy.explanation: Kuaishou's stock code on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange is 01024.

easy.question: Where is Kuaishou's headquarters located?
easy.explanation: Kuaishou's headquarters is located in Xi'erqi, Beijing.

easy.question: How much is Kuaishou's monthly team-building allowance per employee?
easy.explanation: Kuaishou provides a monthly team-building allowance of 250 RMB per employee.

easy.question: What is Kuaishou's Digital Human live streaming platform called?
easy.explanation: Nüwa is Kuaishou's Digital Human live streaming platform.

easy.question: What is the difference between Kuaishou Pai's concept of 'customer' and the typical internet company's 'user'?
options: 'Customer' includes producers, B-end clients, C-end users, and internal clients
easy.answer: 'Customer' includes producers, B-end clients, C-end users, and internal clients
easy.explanation: In Kuaishou Pai, 'customer' is a broader concept that includes producers, B-end clients, C-end users, and internal clients, not just regular users.

easy.question: What is Kuaishou's self-developed AI R&D assistant (coding assistant) called?
easy.explanation: Kwaipilot is Kuaishou's self-developed AI-powered coding assistant.

easy.question: What are Kuaishou's three main revenue sources?
options: Online marketing services, live streaming revenue, other revenue (including e-commerce)
easy.answer: Online marketing services, live streaming revenue, other revenue (including e-commerce)
easy.explanation: Kuaishou's three main revenue sources are online marketing services, live streaming revenue, and other revenue (including e-commerce).

easy.question: In what year was Kuaishou's AI strategy officially launched?
easy.explanation: Kuaishou officially launched its AI strategy in 2023.

easy.question: What type of model does KeLing AI belong to?
easy.explanation: KeLing AI is Kuaishou's video generation large model.

easy.question: What benefit can Kuaishou employees enjoy if they work past 10 PM?
easy.explanation: Kuaishou employees who work past 10 PM can enjoy taxi reimbursement.

easy.question: How many insurances and funds does Kuaishou provide for employees?
easy.explanation: Kuaishou provides six insurances and one housing fund for employees, one more insurance than the standard five.

easy.question: In what year was the KwaiYii large model first released?
easy.explanation: The KwaiYii large model was first released in 2023.

easy.question: What is a core advantage of the KeTu large model?
options: The text-to-image model that best understands Chinese
easy.answer: The text-to-image model that best understands Chinese
easy.explanation: The KeTu large model is known as the text-to-image model that best understands Chinese.

easy.question: Why does Kuaishou use 'customer' instead of 'user'?
options: As business complexity increased, Kuaishou needed to strengthen understanding of producers and B-end clients
easy.answer: As business complexity increased, Kuaishou needed to strengthen understanding of producers and B-end clients
easy.explanation: As Kuaishou's business became more complex, the company needed to strengthen its understanding of producers and B-end clients, which the term 'user' didn't adequately cover.

easy.question: What housing benefit can Kuaishou employees enjoy after working for more than 1 year?
easy.explanation: Kuaishou employees who have worked for more than 1 year can apply for an interest-free home purchase loan.

easy.question: In what year did Kuaishou transform from a GIF tool to a short video community?
easy.explanation: Kuaishou transformed from a GIF tool to a short video community in 2012.

easy.question: What is the name of Kuaishou's international version product?
easy.explanation: Kwai is the name of Kuaishou's international version product.

easy.question: What is the mission of Kuaishou Charity?
options: Technology connecting goodness, creating long-term value
easy.answer: Technology connecting goodness, creating long-term value
easy.explanation: Kuaishou Charity's mission is 'Technology connecting goodness, creating long-term value'.

easy.question: What technology does Kuaishou's recommendation system primarily rely on?
easy.explanation: Kuaishou's recommendation system primarily relies on AI algorithm recommendations.

easy.question: What is the English abbreviation of the KwaiYii large model?
easy.explanation: The English name of the KwaiYii large model is KwaiYii.

easy.question: What technology does Kuaishou's cafeteria use to reduce food waste?
easy.explanation: Kuaishou's cafeteria uses a smart meal station with RFID reading devices to reduce food waste.

easy.question: What is Kuaishou's ranking among global short video platforms by daily active users?
easy.explanation: Kuaishou is the second largest short video platform globally by daily active users.

easy.question: What is the monthly rental subsidy for employees living near Kuaishou's office?
easy.explanation: Kuaishou provides a monthly rental subsidy of 1000 RMB for employees living near the office.

easy.question: On which product was KeLing AI first available for user experience?
easy.explanation: KeLing AI was first available for experience on the KwaiCut App.

easy.question: In what year was Kuaishou's corporate values 'Kuaishou Pai' first formally established?
easy.explanation: Kuaishou Pai was first formally established in 2020.

easy.question: What is Kuaishou's primary business positioning?
easy.explanation: Kuaishou's primary business positioning is a content community and social platform.

medium.question: Among the currently released KwaiYii model versions, what is the largest parameter scale?
medium.explanation: KwaiYii-175B is the largest parameter scale version released so far.

medium.question: What rating did KwaiYii-175B achieve in the CAICT 'Trusted AI' evaluation?
medium.explanation: In June 2024, KwaiYii-175B received the highest Level 5 rating in the CAICT 'Trusted AI' evaluation.

medium.question: What is the maximum video length KeLing AI can generate?
medium.explanation: KeLing supports generating up to 2 minutes of 30fps video at up to 1080p resolution.

medium.question: What was Kwaipilot's full-repo code generation rate as of June 2024?
medium.explanation: As of June 2024, Kwaipilot's full-repo code generation rate reached 18%, meaning nearly one-fifth of new code was AI-generated.

medium.question: What are the three core directions of Kuaishou's large model matrix?
options: Text generation, image generation, video generation
Content understanding & applications, recommendation large models, visual generation large models
medium.answer: Content understanding & applications, recommendation large models, visual generation large models
medium.explanation: Kuaishou's large model layout focuses on content understanding & applications, recommendation large models, and visual generation large models.

medium.question: What does the 'Kuaishou Data Security Management Regulations' primarily govern?
options: Data classification, grading, and security protection
medium.answer: Data classification, grading, and security protection
medium.explanation: The regulations standardize data classification, grading management, and security protection measures.

medium.question: What behavior does the 'Kuaishou Integrity Reporting Management Standards' primarily target?
options: Corruption, bribery, and other violations of integrity and honesty
medium.answer: Corruption, bribery, and other violations of integrity and honesty
medium.explanation: The standards aim to combat corruption, bribery, and other behaviors that violate integrity and honesty.

medium.question: What can the Nüwa digital human live-streaming platform achieve for merchants?
options: Enable 24/7 non-stop live streaming, boosting sales
medium.answer: Enable 24/7 non-stop live streaming, boosting sales
medium.explanation: For example, Haitian Group leveraged Nüwa to extend streaming from 16 to 24 hours, with monthly sales growing about 200% MoM.

medium.question: What milestone did Kuaishou's AIGC marketing materials reach in June 2024?
options: Daily spend peak exceeding 20 million RMB
medium.answer: Daily spend peak exceeding 20 million RMB
medium.explanation: In June 2024, AIGC marketing materials reached a daily spend peak exceeding 20 million RMB.

medium.question: What cost advantage does KwaiYii inference have over open-source solutions?
medium.explanation: Through hardware optimization and hybrid parallel algorithms, KwaiYii inference cost is controlled at one-tenth of open-source solutions.

medium.question: What ranking did KeTu achieve in the Beijing Academy of AI evaluation?
medium.explanation: In the BAAI evaluation, KeTu scored 75.23, ranking second globally in the text-to-image large model field.

medium.question: Where is Kuaishou's data center located?
medium.explanation: Kuaishou's first ultra-large-scale data center is located in Ulanqab.

medium.question: How many followers did AI XiaoKuai gain within 6 months of launch?
medium.explanation: AI XiaoKuai reached 10 million+ followers within 6 months, with MAU 8 million and DAU 1.5 million.

medium.question: What is the Finops methodology mentioned at Kuaishou's 2024 Investor Day?
medium.explanation: Finops is a cloud cost management methodology expected to save hundreds of millions over the next three years.

medium.question: What is the name of Kuaishou's self-developed audiovisual processing large model?
medium.explanation: LPM is Kuaishou's self-developed audiovisual processing large model, the first in the industry to use large models for video enhancement.

medium.question: What is the core requirement of Kuaishou's 'Avoiding Conflict of Interest' framework guidelines?
options: Employees cannot hold stock in other companies
Employees should avoid personal interests conflicting with company interests, and proactively disclose if conflicts arise
medium.answer: Employees should avoid personal interests conflicting with company interests, and proactively disclose if conflicts arise
medium.explanation: The guidelines require employees to identify and avoid conflicts of interest, and proactively disclose when they occur.

medium.question: How many major upgrades did KeLing AI undergo within one month of its 2024 release?
medium.explanation: KeLing AI underwent three major upgrades within one month: text-to-video, image-to-video, and video continuation.

medium.question: What is the integrity and compliance training coverage rate for new Kuaishou employees?
medium.explanation: All new Kuaishou employees (100%) are covered by integrity and compliance training.

medium.question: What ranking did KeLing AI achieve in the Artificial Analysis global video generation leaderboard for the image-to-video track?
medium.explanation: In March 2025, KeLing 1.6 Pro topped the image-to-video track with a score of 1000.

medium.question: What does Kuaishou's 'coding as annotation' data flywheel refer to?
options: Data from developers' daily coding automatically becomes model training annotation data
Annotators must know how to code
medium.answer: Data from developers' daily coding automatically becomes model training annotation data
medium.explanation: Kwaipilot implements a coding-as-annotation data flywheel, where daily development code data automatically flows back as training data.

medium.question: What aspects does Kuaishou's information security management cover?
options: Physical, network, personnel, system security, and more
medium.answer: Physical, network, personnel, system security, and more
medium.explanation: Kuaishou's information security system covers physical & environmental security, log management, incident response, system development & maintenance security, and more.

medium.question: How many times did Kuaishou's AIGC monthly active clients grow from January to June 2024?
medium.explanation: Compared to January 2024, AIGC monthly active clients in June grew 8x.

medium.question: What model architecture does KeLing AI use?
medium.explanation: KeLing uses a Sora-like DiT structure, replacing traditional convolutional networks with Transformers.

medium.question: What exclusive live-streaming capability does Kuaishou's self-developed smart video processing chip support?
medium.explanation: Based on the self-developed smart video processing chip, it supports the industry-exclusive 4K60fps live stream of Black Myth: Wukong.

medium.question: What does the 'Kuaishou Vulnerability Handling Standards' primarily regulate?
options: Security vulnerability discovery, reporting, remediation, and response processes
medium.answer: Security vulnerability discovery, reporting, remediation, and response processes
medium.explanation: The standards regulate the discovery, reporting, and remediation response processes for security vulnerabilities.

medium.question: How many times did Kuaishou's AIGC platform ad revenue scale grow from January to June 2024?
medium.explanation: Compared to January 2024, the platform's AIGC ad revenue scale in June grew 12x.

medium.question: What are the two largest categories in AI XiaoKuai's demand distribution?
options: Emotional companionship and video content understanding
medium.answer: Emotional companionship and video content understanding
medium.explanation: AI XiaoKuai's demand distribution: emotional companionship ~22%, video content understanding ~23%, the two largest categories.

medium.question: What is the core principle of Kuaishou's 'Privacy Protection Standards'?
options: Collect as much data as possible
Collect and use personal information lawfully and in compliance, respecting and protecting user privacy
Only protect privacy when users complain
Sell privacy data to third parties
medium.answer: Collect and use personal information lawfully and in compliance, respecting and protecting user privacy
medium.explanation: The standards require lawful and compliant collection and use of personal information, respecting and protecting user privacy.

medium.question: What is Kuaishou's recommendation large model primarily used for?
options: Content understanding and distribution, improving efficiency in recommendation, search, advertising, and other scenarios
medium.answer: Content understanding and distribution, improving efficiency in recommendation, search, advertising, and other scenarios
medium.explanation: The recommendation large model is used for content understanding and distribution, applied to recommendation, search, advertising, vertical operations, ecosystem analysis, content safety, and more.

medium.question: By how much did KwaiYii's GPU cluster compute utilization efficiency improve?
medium.explanation: Through hardware optimization and hybrid parallel algorithms, KwaiYii's GPU cluster compute utilization efficiency improved by over 50%.

medium.question: What is the maximum support amount for CCF-Kuaishou Large Model Explorer Fund projects?
medium.explanation: CCF-Kuaishou Large Model Explorer Fund projects can receive up to 300,000 RMB in support.

medium.question: What is the primary purpose of the 'Kuaishou Employee Account and Permission Management Requirements'?
options: Standardize employee account creation, permission allocation, and revocation processes
medium.answer: Standardize employee account creation, permission allocation, and revocation processes
medium.explanation: The requirements aim to standardize account creation, permission allocation, and revocation to prevent permission abuse.

medium.question: What is the significant upgrade in KeLing AI's version 2.0 released in April 2025?
options: Full base model upgrade, releasing KeLing 2.0 video generation model and KeTu 2.0 image generation model
medium.answer: Full base model upgrade, releasing KeLing 2.0 video generation model and KeTu 2.0 image generation model
medium.explanation: On April 15, 2025, all KeLing AI models entered the 2.0 era.

medium.question: How does Kuaishou's outsourced personnel security management differ from regular employees?
options: Outsourced personnel require additional security screening and tighter permission controls
Outsourced personnel don't need security training
medium.answer: Outsourced personnel require additional security screening and tighter permission controls
medium.explanation: The 'Kuaishou Outsourced Personnel Security Management Requirements' specify additional security screening and permission controls for outsourced staff.

medium.question: What is Kuaishou's Temporal Scaling Law theory used for?
medium.explanation: The Temporal Scaling Law theory provides new theoretical support for hyperparameter optimization.

medium.question: Who does the 'Kuaishou Vendor Information Security Management Regulations' primarily govern?
medium.explanation: The regulations standardize information security requirements for vendors and partners.

medium.question: What is the approximate global user base of KeLing AI as of April 2025?
medium.explanation: Within 10 months of launch, KeLing AI's monthly active users grew 25x, reaching over 22 million globally.

medium.question: What does the 'Kuaishou Security Incident Emergency Response Standards' primarily define?
options: Information security incident classification, response, handling, and review processes
medium.answer: Information security incident classification, response, handling, and review processes
medium.explanation: The standards regulate the full-process management of information security incident emergency response.

medium.question: How many iterations has KeLing AI completed within 10 months of launch?
medium.explanation: KeLing AI has completed over 20 iterations within 10 months of launch.

medium.question: What does the 'Kuaishou System Development and Maintenance Security Management' primarily focus on?
options: Information security controls throughout the system development and maintenance lifecycle
medium.answer: Information security controls throughout the system development and maintenance lifecycle
medium.explanation: It standardizes information security control requirements during system development and maintenance.

hard.question: What algorithm did KwaiYii use to optimize Token efficiency during pretraining?
hard.explanation: KwaiYii uses the Scaffold-BPE algorithm to optimize pretraining efficiency, improving GPU compute utilization by over 50%.

hard.question: What innovative loss function did Kuaishou adopt during KwaiYii training to improve results?
hard.explanation: Kuaishou innovatively integrated Scaffold-BPE, MiLe Loss, and other cutting-edge algorithms to improve pretraining efficiency and effectiveness.

hard.question: What innovation did Kuaishou propose in KwaiYii's decoding strategy to improve inference speed?
hard.explanation: Kuaishou proposed an innovative parallel decoding prediction strategy that significantly improves inference speed.

hard.question: What techniques did Kuaishou use in model alignment training?
hard.explanation: Kuaishou uses Iterative DPO/PPO, fine-grained Loss, and other strategies to improve training stability and model performance.

hard.question: How does Kuaishou process PB-level raw data into a high-quality training set?
options: Rejection Sampling and other techniques for refinement
hard.answer: Rejection Sampling and other techniques for refinement
hard.explanation: Kuaishou uses Rejection Sampling and other techniques to significantly improve data quality, refining PB-level data into TB-level high-quality training sets.

hard.question: What diffusion model base does KeLing AI use?
hard.explanation: KeLing uses Flow models as the diffusion model base to improve computational efficiency.

hard.question: Kwaipilot was the first among major Chinese tech companies to successfully apply what architecture to pretraining a code large model?
hard.explanation: Kwaipilot was the first among major Chinese tech companies to successfully apply the MoE architecture to pretraining a code large model.

hard.question: What was KwaiYii-13B's score in the CMMLU Chinese evaluation for humanities?
hard.explanation: KwaiYii-13B scored over 61 in the CMMLU Chinese evaluation for humanities.

hard.question: What learning approach did Kuaishou use for organizing KwaiYii training data?
hard.explanation: KwaiYii ensures efficient and stable training through a Curriculum Learning approach to data organization.

hard.question: What strategy does KeLing AI use during training to optimize results?
hard.explanation: KeLing AI uses a multi-stage training strategy to optimize model performance during training.

hard.question: What is the core difference between Kuaishou's recommendation large model and traditional recommendation systems?
options: Uses large language models to understand video content and user interests, rather than relying solely on feature engineering
hard.answer: Uses large language models to understand video content and user interests, rather than relying solely on feature engineering
hard.explanation: Kuaishou uses large language models and multimodal large models to understand video content and user interests, replacing traditional feature engineering.

hard.question: What important performance milestone did Kuaishou's KwaiYii model achieve in 2024?
options: Surpassed GPT-4 in comprehensive Chinese performance
hard.answer: Surpassed GPT-4 in comprehensive Chinese performance
hard.explanation: In Q2 2024, KwaiYii surpassed GPT-4 in comprehensive Chinese-language performance.

hard.question: What accuracy rate did Kuaishou's marketing-domain large model achieve for short video content understanding?
hard.explanation: The marketing-domain large model's short video content understanding accuracy reached 91%, matching GPT-4.

hard.question: How many concurrent live streams can a single server cluster of Kuaishou's Nüwa digital human platform support?
hard.explanation: The Nüwa digital human live-streaming system supports 2,200 concurrent live streams per single server cluster.

hard.question: What layered structure does Kuaishou's information security system adopt?
options: Three layers: governance, management, and execution
hard.answer: Three layers: governance, management, and execution
hard.explanation: Kuaishou's ESG governance uses a three-level structure: governance, management, and implementation.

hard.question: What is the purpose of the multi-sample Packing technique used in KwaiYii training?
options: Improve GPU utilization and reduce padding waste
hard.answer: Improve GPU utilization and reduce padding waste
hard.explanation: Multi-sample Packing packs multiple samples into one sequence, reducing padding waste and improving training efficiency.

hard.question: What is the responsibility of the Corporate Governance Committee in Kuaishou's ESG governance?
options: Authorized by the board to coordinate and formulate ESG strategy
hard.answer: Authorized by the board to coordinate and formulate ESG strategy
hard.explanation: The Corporate Governance Committee is authorized to coordinate and formulate ESG strategy.

hard.question: Approximately what percentage of total KeLing AI video creations does image-to-video account for?
hard.explanation: Image-to-video accounts for approximately 85% of KeLing AI video creations.

hard.question: What risks does the 'Kuaishou Physical and Environmental Security Management' primarily control?
options: Physical access control and environmental security for data centers and office areas
hard.answer: Physical access control and environmental security for data centers and office areas
hard.explanation: It standardizes physical access control, environmental security, and other control requirements.

hard.question: What types of models are included in Kwaipilot's model matrix?
options: Code completion + Code Embedding + Code Agent + Code/Math Instruct
hard.answer: Code completion + Code Embedding + Code Agent + Code/Math Instruct
hard.explanation: Kwaipilot expanded from a code completion model to a model matrix including Code Embedding, Code Agent, and Code/Math Instruct.

hard.question: What is the data processing pipeline for KwaiYii large model training?
options: Raw data → Cleaning → Rejection Sampling → Curriculum Learning organization → High-quality training set
Download from the internet and train directly
hard.answer: Raw data → Cleaning → Rejection Sampling → Curriculum Learning organization → High-quality training set
hard.explanation: KwaiYii refines PB-level raw data through cleaning, Rejection Sampling, and Curriculum Learning organization into TB-level high-quality training sets.

hard.question: By how much did Kwaipilot surpass GPT-4 in Kuaishou dialect-specific code semantic understanding and generation?
hard.explanation: With data-augmented model performance, Kwaipilot surpassed GPT-4 by 10% in Kuaishou dialect-specific code scenarios.

hard.question: What was the response time improvement for Kuaishou's ad lead customer service system after using KwaiYii?
hard.explanation: The KwaiYii-powered ad lead customer service system reduced response time to within 10 seconds.

hard.question: What was the theme of the large model forum Kuaishou hosted at WAIC 2024?
options: New AI · New Applications · New Ecosystem
hard.answer: New AI · New Applications · New Ecosystem
hard.explanation: During WAIC 2024, Kuaishou hosted a large model forum themed 'New AI · New Applications · New Ecosystem'.

hard.question: What is the primary objective of the 'Kuaishou Information System Security Inspection and Audit Management System'?
options: Regularly audit information system security status to ensure compliance and security
hard.answer: Regularly audit information system security status to ensure compliance and security
hard.explanation: The system aims to regularly inspect and audit information system security status.

hard.question: How many well-known directors participated in KeLing AI's Directors Co-creation Program?
hard.explanation: KeLing AI's Directors Co-creation Program invited 9 renowned directors, including Li Shaohong, Jia Zhangke, and Yee Chung-Man.

hard.question: How many enterprise clients has KeLing AI's API established partnerships with?
hard.explanation: KeLing AI has partnered with thousands of enterprise clients including Xiaomi, Amazon Web Services, and Alibaba Cloud.

hard.question: When live-streaming Black Myth: Wukong, Kuaishou compressed the bitrate to what percentage of competitors'?
hard.explanation: Based on the self-developed smart video processing chip, 4K60fps streaming bitrate was compressed to under 50% of competitors'.

hard.question: What does the 'Kuaishou Log Management Standards' primarily govern?
options: System log collection, storage, protection, and audit trails
hard.answer: System log collection, storage, protection, and audit trails
hard.explanation: The standards regulate requirements for system log collection, storage, protection, and audit trails.

hard.question: The total prize pool for Kuaishou's KeLing AI Video Creation Contest exceeded how much?
hard.explanation: The first KeLing AI x KuaiYing Video Creation Contest had a total prize pool exceeding 300,000 RMB.

hard.question: What scale of data was used for KwaiYii pretraining?
hard.explanation: KwaiYii, trained on multi-trillion tokens, achieved excellent results on MMLU, C-Eval, and other authoritative benchmarks.

hard.question: What performance did Kwaipilot achieve on HumanEval, CoSQA, and SWE-bench?
hard.explanation: Kwaipilot achieved SOTA performance on HumanEval, CoSQA, and SWE-bench.

hard.question: What is the role of KeLing AI's video description model?
hard.explanation: KeLing developed a video description model to improve text instruction responsiveness.

hard.question: What does the 'Kuaishou Personnel Information Security Management Regulations' primarily address?
options: Personnel-related information security controls, including onboarding, transfer, and departure security handling
hard.answer: Personnel-related information security controls, including onboarding, transfer, and departure security handling
hard.explanation: The regulations standardize personnel-related information security controls.

hard.question: What next-generation architecture is Kuaishou's KwaiYii model currently developing?
hard.explanation: In 2024, Kuaishou is developing the KwaiYii MoE model.

hard.question: How many video assets has KeLing AI's API cumulatively generated?
hard.explanation: As of 2025, KeLing API has cumulatively generated over 40 million video assets.

hard.question: What is AI XiaoKuai's core capability for integrating internal and external resources and tools?
hard.explanation: The core of AI XiaoKuai's ability to link complex user queries with internal and external tools is Function Calling.

hard.question: What capabilities did AI XiaoKuai gain after integrating RAG?
options: Understanding time-sensitive information, common knowledge, community culture, and memes
hard.answer: Understanding time-sensitive information, common knowledge, community culture, and memes
hard.explanation: RAG integration gave XiaoKuai the ability to understand time-sensitive information, common knowledge, community culture, and memes.

hard.question: Which of the following is NOT a KeLing AI enterprise client?
hard.explanation: KeLing AI has partnerships with Xiaomi, Amazon Web Services, and Alibaba Cloud. OpenAI is not a partner.

hard.question: According to Kuaishou's platform employment data, how many employment opportunities did the ecosystem drive as of 2022?
hard.explanation: As of 2022, Kuaishou's platform ecosystem drove a total of 36.21 million employment opportunities.
